At the bottom of the cliff face southeast of Liurnia Lake Shore lies the entrance to Stillwater Cave:
Head inside and grab the Stillwater Cave grace.
Pick up the Golden Rune [3] on a ledge just past the grace.
Follow the upper section across a gap and through a tunnel that leads to an Operatic Bat that drops a guaranteed Golden Rune [6] (first time).
Loot the Sage Set, Serpent Arrow x15, and Golden Rune [5] in the room.
Exit the tunnel and drop into the poison for a Golden Rune [4] next to two Miranda Blossoms.
Return to the upper section and continue to a corpse with Glowstone x5.
Pick up the Poison Grease x2 in the corner opposite the boss entrance.
Kill the Cleanrot Knight for Winged Sword Insignia and 3,300 runes.

Return to Liurnia Lake Shore, head north-northwest and follow the wall on your left to a spiritspring. Use it facing southeast to find an evergaol and kill Adan, Thief of Fire for Flame of the Fell God and 3,800 runes.
Head west-northwest from the evergaol until you reach a wagon with Ballista Bolt x5 in front.
Loot the Fire Spur Me gesture, Fire Monks' Prayerbook, and Dappled Cured Meat (in a tent) in the camp down the slope.
Travel to Laskyar Ruins and explore the ruins just northwest of the grace:
Optional: Kill the Revenant spawning in the middle for a Ghost Glovewort [2] (first time).
Grab the Smithing Stone [3] beside the stairs to the building with the spires if you haven't already.
Pick up the Ritual Pot northeast of the sending gate, then the Golden Rune [3] on the ground behind it.
Head down the cellar west of the rune to obtain the Wraith Calling Bell.
MISSABLE: From the cellar, head north-northwest to a round stone building on your right. Talk to Rya inside and hear her request.
Head toward the island west of Rya to discover the Scenic Isle grace.
Optional: Talk to Patches next to the grace. Select "Speaking of" and "Talk".
On an island west-northwest of Patches, you'll find a basin with the Dexterity-knot Crystal Tear.
Continue northeast from the island to grab the Boilprawn Shack grace in front of a shack.
Talk to Blackguard and purchase Rya's Necklace from him.
MISSABLE: Buy one Boiled Prawn from him to learn the Spread Out gesture. Optionally, select "About Rya" and "Talk".
Climb the large ruin north of Boilprawn Shack to find a corpse with Rainbow Stone x4 at the top.
On top of another ruin just west lies a corpse with Tarnished Golden Sunflower x4.
Go back down the slope of the ruin, then head west-northwest to discover the Fallen Ruins of the Lake grace on a third ruin.
In the building surrounded by Crayfish south of the grace, you'll find Smithing Stone [2] x3.
Kill the lone Crayfish west-northwest of the building and it'll turn into a Grafted Scion that drops a Larval Tear.
Continue west-northwest to an island with a church. Talk to Varre in front, answer that they didn't seem right, then talk to him again for Festering Bloody Finger x5.
MISSABLE: If this is the first time you obtain a Festering Bloody Finger, you will also receive About Invasion Multiplayer.
Pick up Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [12] from the corpse in the church.
In the water just northwest of the church is a scarab that drops Bloodflame Blade.
Return to the church, then head west until you reach a building. Inside is a corpse with Smithing Stone [2] x3.
Pop the balloon south of the building to receive a Golden Rune [6]. You can use any ranged weapon, but I prefer to use throwing knives.
Head east-southeast from the balloon until you see a large rock jutting from the water. Pick up the Somber Smithing Stone [1] x2 in a chair behind it, guarded by a Giant Crab.
Southeast of the chair, past the large rocks, is a small building with the Folly on the Lake grace inside.
Pick up the Smithing Stone [2] x2 below a dead tree in the nearby poison swamp.
On a small island south-southeast of the tree is a scarab that drops Ash of War: Vow of the Indomitable.
From the island, head west toward a slope with several gibbets. However, continue along the swamp to grab a Smithing Stone [2] between a tree and a rock on the left side.
Return to the slope with the gibbets to enter the Village of the Albinaurics:
Exhaust Nepheli's dialogue on the slope leading up to the village.
Enter the village and pick up a Larval Tear behind one of the stone coffins.
Activate the Village of the Albinaurics grace inside the small shack.
Head up the slope east of the grace and roll through the glowing pot to reveal Albus. Talk to him to receive the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right).
Loot the coffin next to Albus to obtain the Ivory Sickle.
Cross the upper bridge and kill the Omenkiller for Crucible Knot Talisman and 4,900 runes.
Optional: Nepheli's summon sign can be found on the slope overlooking the boss if you exhausted her dialogue under the bridge.
At the bottom of the slope past the boss is a Rune Arc.
Return to the grace in the village and cross the nearby bridge. Behind a tree on the left is an Albinauric Bloodclot.
Next to the edge at the end is a corpse with the Crystal Sword.
Drop down next to the corpse, then head north up a ledge to find a scarab on the left side cliff edge. Kill it for a Somber Smithing Stone [2].
Make your way to the tower in the distance west of the cliff edge to grab the Converted Tower grace in front of it.
MISSABLE: Travel to Roundtable Hold, where Ensha will now attempt to ambush you. Kill him to obtain the Clinging Bone, then pick up the Royal Remains Set outside Gideon's study.
Talk to Gideon Ofnir about Ensha twice.
Go down the stairs next to the blacksmith and talk to Nepheli.
Return to Gideon Ofnir and talk to him about Nepheli's despair.
Head back to Nepheli and select "I heard from Gideon", then talk to her again.
Travel to the Scenic Isle and head south toward an island with a Glass Shard in the middle, guarded by some Demi-Humans.
In the cliff face south of the island lies the entrance to Lakeside Crystal Cave:
Grab the Lakeside Crystal Cave grace and open the chest containing an Arteria Leaf.
Up the rubble on the left is corpse with Hefty Beast Bone x3.
Head inside the tunnel at the end that leads to a chest with the Spear Talisman.
Exit the tunnel and descend the ledges below the cliff until you reach a campfire. Pick up the Throwing Dagger x5 in the room.
Continue to a Golden Rune [5] surrounded by snails.
When dropping down the cliff, drop from the left side to land on a ledge with Soft Cotton x2.
Loot the Smithing Stone [4], Smithing Stone [2], and Lump of Flesh at the bottom.
Kill the Bloodhound Knight for Cerulean Amber Medallion and 3,600 runes.
Talk to Latenna outside and show her the secret medallion. Hear her request, then talk to her again to receive Latenna the Albinauric.
Activate the Slumbering Wolf's Shack grace and pick up the Rune Arc on the elevated platform.
